channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Royal Commission Highlights Daily Anti-Semitism Faced by Jewish Australians
item.description: The Royal Commission into anti-Semitism and social cohesion has revealed the daily realities faced by Australia's Jewish community. Witnesses described living with constant precautions, from assessing...

item.title: Kamala Harris Supports Mayor Karen Bass in Los Angeles Mayoral Race
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris endorsed Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass for reelection, highlighting Bass’ achievements in reducing homelessness and crime. The endorsement comes as ballots arrive in...

item.title: P. Viswanathan of Congress Secures Narrow Victory in Melur Assembly Polls 2026
item.description: In the recently concluded 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, the Melur constituency witnessed a tightly contested race. Indian National Congress (INC) candidate P. Viswanathan emerged victorious, sec...

item.title: Big Ten Challenges Amazon-Duke Streaming Deal Over Michigan Game Rights
item.description: Amazon’s newly announced partnership with Duke University to stream select non-conference basketball games has quickly encountered complications, highlighting the complexity of college sports media ri...

item.title: Raghav Chadha Congratulates BJP on West Bengal Election Victory
item.description: Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha extended his congratulations to the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) for their remarkable performance in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly Elections. The BJP has secured 207 s...

item.title: TotalEnergies Kenya Reports KSh 2.17 Billion Profit Despite Revenue Drop
item.description: TotalEnergies Marketing Kenya has reported a net profit of KSh 2.17 billion for the year ending December 2025, marking a 45.9 percent increase from the previous year. This growth came despite a declin...

item.title: DUI Driver in Salinas Crashes Into Ambulance, Injuring Two EMTs
item.description: In Salinas, California, an ambulance responding to a medical emergency with lights and siren activated was struck head-on by a Chevy Cruze driven by an allegedly intoxicated driver, Armando Ortiz Mend...

item.title: Tensions Escalate as Iran Reasserts Control Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The geopolitical situation in the Middle East has entered a precarious phase as tensions regarding the Strait of Hormuz continue to escalate. Reports indicate that Iranian military forces have declare...

item.title: Court Rules on Evidence Against Emefiele’s Co-defendant in Bribe Trial
item.description: In a recent ruling by the Lagos State Special Offences Court in Ikeja, key evidence against Henry Omoile, a co-defendant of former Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) governor, Godwin Emefiele, has been adm...

item.title: Diesel and gasoline prices set to rise after weeks of rollbacks
item.description: Oil prices in the Philippines are expected to rise starting May 5, following three consecutive weeks of diesel price rollbacks. This comes as global and local factors influence the energy sector, affe...

item.title: Review of My High-Yield Portfolio Performance and Dividend Strategy
item.description: Investors looking for above-average cash flow should focus on two key factors: the quality of the security and its dividend history. High-yield stocks often carry higher risks, so it’s important to un...

item.title: Social media influencer ‘Justice Crack’ remanded in SSS custody over cybercrime allegations
item.description: For Abuja, the Federal High Court don order say popular social media influencer, Justice Chidiebere, wey people sabi as 'Justice Crack', go remain for State Security Service (SSS) custody. This matter...

item.title: Matiang'i Defends Former President Uhuru Amid Criticism From Ruto's Allies
item.description: Jubilee Party leader Fred Matiang'i has strongly defended former President Uhuru Kenyatta, condemning recent attacks from allies of President William Ruto as shocking and indecent. Speaking at a press...

item.title: Top Ten Favourite Purchases and Products Among Readers in April
item.description: In April, readers showed a clear preference for products that combine practicality, style, and affordability, signalling a desire for refreshment and rejuvenation as the season changed. The De’Longhi ...

item.title: GameStop’s $56 Billion eBay Bid Raises Questions Over Funding Plan
item.description: GameStop has proposed an unsolicited $56 billion acquisition of eBay, offering $125 per share in a deal that is roughly half cash and half stock. The gaming‑retail company, valued at only about $12 bi...

item.title: Factors Behind BJP’s Landslide Win in Assam 2026 Assembly Elections
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has secured a significant victory in the 2026 Assam Assembly elections, set to form the government for the third consecutive term with an estimated 82 out of 126 seats...

item.title: Celebrities and High-Profile Donors Contribute to Los Angeles Mayoral Campaigns
item.description: Several high-profile figures, including Lakers governor Jeanie Buss, 'Saturday Night Live' host Colin Jost, and former Major League Baseball star Dave Winfield, have contributed to candidates in the L...

item.title: Restoration of Roman-Era Monuments Completed at Ancient Olympia in Greece
item.description: Greece has completed a major restoration project at Ancient Olympia, focusing on three significant Roman-era monuments: the Early Christian Basilica, the South Thermae, and the Baths of the Leonidaion...

item.title: Indian Judge Found Dead at Home; Police Investigate Circumstances
item.description: An Indian judge, Aman Kumar Sharma, aged 30, was found dead in his bathroom at home shortly after a reported heated argument with his wife. Sharma, who served as Secretary of the District Legal Servic...

item.title: Reform’s controversial migrant detention centre policy targets Green-voting areas
item.description: Reform’s recent proposal to create migrant detention centres in Green-voting areas has sparked criticism and concern. Zia Yusuf, Reform's home affairs spokesperson, unveiled a policy that would see mi...
